mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO T_LH_SCHEDULE_RESULT ( FACTORY_CODE, BATCH_NO, ORDER_NO, LH_MACHINE_CODE, LEFT_RIGHT_MOULD, LH_MACHINE_NAME, MATERIAL_CODE, SPEC_CODE, EMBRYO_CODE, STRUCTURE_NAME, MATERIAL_DESC, MAIN_MATERIAL_DESC, EMBRYO_STOCK, SPEC_DESC, LH_TIME, DAILY_PLAN_QTY, SCHEDULE_DATE, SPEC_END_TIME, PRODUCTION_STATUS, CLASS1_PLAN_QTY, CLASS1_START_TIME, CLASS1_END_TIME, CLASS1_ANALYSIS, CLASS1_FINISH_QTY, CLASS2_PLAN_QTY, CLASS2_START_TIME, CLASS2_END_TIME, CLASS2_ANALYSIS, CLASS2_FINISH_QTY, CLASS3_PLAN_QTY, CLASS3_START_TIME, CLASS3_END_TIME, CLASS3_ANALYSIS, CLASS3_FINISH_QTY, CLASS4_PLAN_QTY, CLASS4_START_TIME, CLASS4_END_TIME, CLASS4_ANALYSIS, CLASS4_FINISH_QTY, CLASS5_PLAN_QTY, CLASS5_START_TIME, CLASS5_END_TIME, CLASS5_ANALYSIS, CLASS5_FINISH_QTY, CLASS6_PLAN_QTY, CLASS6_START_TIME, CLASS6_END_TIME, CLASS6_ANALYSIS, CLASS6_FINISH_QTY, CLASS7_PLAN_QTY, CLASS7_START_TIME, CLASS7_END_TIME, CLASS7_ANALYSIS, CLASS7_FINISH_QTY, CLASS8_PLAN_QTY, CLASS8_START_TIME, CLASS8_END_TIME, CLASS8_ANALYSIS, CLASS8_FINISH_QTY, IS_DELIVERY, IS_RELEASE, PUBLISH_SUCCESS_COUNT, NEWEST_PUBLISH_TIME, DATA_SOURCE, MOULD_QTY, SINGLE_MOULD_SHIFT_QTY, MOULD_INFO, MOULD_METHOD, CONSTRUCTION_STAGE, EMBRYO_NO, TEXT_NO, LH_NO, MONTH_PLAN_VERSION, MACHINE_ORDER, IS_TRIAL, REAL_SCHEDULE_DATE, TDAY_SPEC_END_TIME, IS_FIRST, MOULD_SURPLUS_QTY, IS_END, PRODUCTION_VERSION, MOULD_CODE, IS_SPLIT, SCHEDULE_ORDER, SCHEDULE_TYPE, IS_CHANGE_MOULD, TOTAL_DAILY_PLAN_QTY, IS_TYPE_BLOCK, MOULD_CHANGE_START_TIME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_TIME, REMARK, IS_DELETE ) VALUES
( #{item.factoryCode}, #{item.batchNo}, #{item.orderNo}, #{item.lhMachineCode}, #{item.leftRightMould}, #{item.lhMachineName}, #{item.materialCode}, #{item.specCode}, #{item.embryoCode}, #{item.structureName}, #{item.materialDesc}, #{item.mainMaterialDesc}, #{item.embryoStock}, #{item.specDesc}, #{item.lhTime}, #{item.dailyPlanQty}, #{item.scheduleDate}, #{item.specEndTime}, #{item.productionStatus}, #{item.class1PlanQty}, #{item.class1StartTime}, #{item.class1EndTime}, #{item.class1Analysis}, #{item.class1FinishQty}, #{item.class2PlanQty}, #{item.class2StartTime}, #{item.class2EndTime}, #{item.class2Analysis}, #{item.class2FinishQty}, #{item.class3PlanQty}, #{item.class3StartTime}, #{item.class3EndTime}, #{item.class3Analysis}, #{item.class3FinishQty}, #{item.class4PlanQty}, #{item.class4StartTime}, #{item.class4EndTime}, #{item.class4Analysis}, #{item.class4FinishQty}, #{item.class5PlanQty}, #{item.class5StartTime}, #{item.class5EndTime}, #{item.class5Analysis}, #{item.class5FinishQty}, #{item.class6PlanQty}, #{item.class6StartTime}, #{item.class6EndTime}, #{item.class6Analysis}, #{item.class6FinishQty}, #{item.class7PlanQty}, #{item.class7StartTime}, #{item.class7EndTime}, #{item.class7Analysis}, #{item.class7FinishQty}, #{item.class8PlanQty}, #{item.class8StartTime}, #{item.class8EndTime}, #{item.class8Analysis}, #{item.class8FinishQty}, #{item.isDelivery}, #{item.isRelease}, #{item.publishSuccessCount}, #{item.newestPublishTime}, #{item.dataSource}, #{item.mouldQty}, #{item.singleMouldShiftQty}, #{item.mouldInfo}, #{item.mouldMethod}, #{item.constructionStage}, #{item.embryoNo}, #{item.textNo}, #{item.lhNo}, #{item.monthPlanVersion}, #{item.machineOrder}, #{item.isTrial}, #{item.realScheduleDate}, #{item.tdaySpecEndTime}, #{item.isFirst}, #{item.mouldSurplusQty}, #{item.isEnd}, #{item.productionVersion}, #{item.mouldCode}, #{item.isSplit}, #{item.scheduleOrder}, #{item.scheduleType}, #{item.isChangeMould}, #{item.totalDailyPlanQty}, #{item.isTypeBlock}, #{item.mouldChangeStartTime}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateBy}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.remark}, #{item.isDelete} )
